\tzpentry{ID4079}{Permittivity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4079 introduces Permittivity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(\epsilon_n = \|\, |P[\psi_n]|^2 - I_{\mathrm{target}} \|^2 / \|I_{\mathrm{target}}\|^2.\)
\]
